ink.usage: Primary text, wordmark, CTA background, ledger strokes.

starGold.usage: Logo-only star accent for the EU-stars-inspired Schengen constellation mark.

booked.usage: Booked or committed trips, not legal protection.

motion.reducedMotion: Disable non-essential motion. Preserve instant state feedback.

signatureComponents.answerCard: Verdict chip, dominant metric, supporting facts, proof affordance.
signatureComponents.rollingWindowTimeline: Active 180-day frame with past, booked, what-if, return, and risk segments.
signatureComponents.proofLedger: Inspectable explanation of counted days, inclusive counting, and days returning soon.

critiqueSummary.identityBoard: Strong enough to canonize. Lock paper-and-ink palette, Source Sans 3 plus IBM Plex Mono, Star Gold, and EU-stars-inspired Schengen constellation mark direction.
critiqueSummary.tufteMock: Best proof density and trust language. Too dense for default home but ideal for explanation/report surfaces.
critiqueSummary.synthesisMock: Best mobile production base. Replace purple simulation state with amber and remove protected-language ambiguity.
critiqueSummary.currentSvelteShell: Functional prototype only. It uses Inter, blue gradients, over-rounded cards, and shadows that conflict with the canonical direction.
